title: polygala macroneura
intro: Polygala macroneura, also known as Yuan Zhi or Chinese Thunder of Heaven, is a plant species belonging to the Polygalaceae family. It is traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to enhance cognitive function, reduce anxiety and stress, and promote relaxation. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including improving sleep quality, reducing symptoms of depression and anxiety, and boosting the immune system. The herbal preparations of Polygala macroneura typically involve drying and processing the roots and stems, which can be made into teas, capsules, or tablets for consumption.
